data.current_summary: Create a dynamic PayNow QR payment
data.current_description: Creates a one-time PayNow QR code for a specific payment amount. Maximum SGD 20,000. Default QR expiry is 5 minutes.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a one-time dynamic PayNow QR code for a specific payment amount in SGD. Accepts amounts up to SGD 20,000. The generated QR code expires after 5 minutes by default and can only be used once. Returns a PayNow payment response containing the QR code data and payment reference. This operation is suitable for single-transaction scenarios where a unique QR code is needed per payment.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity on what is returned (response structure) and doesn't explain the side effects or use case context. data.current_summary: Create a static PayNow QR code
data.current_description: Creates a reusable static PayNow QR code that can accept unlimited payments.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a reusable static PayNow QR code that can accept unlimited payments without expiration. The QR code remains valid indefinitely and can be used across multiple transactions. Returns a static PayNow response containing the QR code data and payment method reference. This operation is suitable for recurring payment scenarios, merchant storefronts, or any use case requiring a persistent payment collection method. Unlike dynamic QR codes, static QR codes do not expire and do not require regeneration for each payment.
